description: Detection, divination, and enhanced senses that reveal what others miss.
powers: Wall Sight
Stone and wood become translucent to the wielder's gaze. Secrets hidden behind walls have nowhere left to hide.
Far Hearing
Distant conversations arrive as clearly as whispers in the ear. Focus, and the miles between collapse to nothing.
Aura Reading
Enchanted objects betray themselves. Their magical nature glows visible, each school of magic a different hue.
Object Memory
Touch something and feel its past. Every hand that held it, every room it sat in, rising like a dream.
Hostile Sense
Ill intent registers like a cold wind. The item warns of enemies before they reveal themselves.
Bloodhound
Once touched, a creature cannot hide. The trail burns bright in the wielder's mind no matter where it leads.
Hidden Script
Invisible ink, concealed runes, secret messages. All of them surface under this item's knowing gaze.
Night Eyes
Darkness becomes a different shade of light. The wielder sees as clearly in shadow as in the noonday sun.
Perfect Recall
Everything seen is remembered with absolute clarity. No detail fades, no face is forgotten.
Empathic Lens
Emotions become visible. Fear, joy, deceit. They radiate from every creature like colored smoke.
Danger Mirror
A conjured looking glass that shows not the viewer's face, but the nearest threat drawing close.
Borrowed Wings
The wielder sees through the eyes of birds overhead. A stolen vantage from the sky, effortless and silent.
Inner Clock
Time becomes tangible. Dawn, midnight, the exact second. The wielder always knows precisely when they are.
Thought Skim
Surface thoughts drift upward like bubbles, readable to the wielder. Only the top layer, but that is often enough.
True Sight
Disguises and shifted forms unravel. The wielder sees what hides beneath every borrowed shape.
Ley Compass
The item tugs gently toward the nearest current of raw magic. Follow it and find where power pools.
Echo Sense
Sound becomes sight. The wielder reads the shape of rooms, the presence of bodies, all through returning echoes.
Keen Senses
Every sense sharpens. Colors brighten, faint sounds clarify, distant scents arrive. The world reveals its hidden layers.
Faerie Veil
Invisible things are betrayed by a clinging luminescence. What cannot be seen begins to glow.
Emotion Tide
The strongest feeling in any nearby creature washes over the wielder like a wave. Joy, rage, sorrow, all laid bare.
